original_text:
### Email Canvas & Grid **[GENERAL — not specified in guide; Solstice email baseline]**
- Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly.
- Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
- Internal section grid: 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60).
- **Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless). Full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px, but text within them still respects 24px insets.
- **Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
  - Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
  - Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.
- Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette]:** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics. One primary CTA per section maximum.

relations.note: Cardinality limit applies alongside the primary CTA styling.

quotes: ### Email Canvas & Grid **[GENERAL — not specified in guide; Solstice email baseline]**
Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly.
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
Internal section grid: 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60).

rules.intent: Ensure a consistent fixed email canvas and responsive collapse so sections assemble seamlessly.
rules.rule_text: Email body width is 600px (size.canvas.email_body_width_600) fixed and centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly. Mobile breakpoint is 480px (breakpoint.mobile.480) at which all multi-column layouts collapse to single column. Internal section grid uses a 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60, ratio.grid.image_text_40_60).

quotes: **Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.

**Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless). Full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px, but text within them still respects 24px insets.
**Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.

rules.intent: Maintain consistent spacing and zero-gap section stacking so modular sections assemble seamlessly.
rules.rule_text: Section side padding is 24px (padding.section.side_24) left/right, consistent across ALL sections (this is what makes assembly seamless); full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px but text within them still respects the 24px insets. Vertical rhythm uses an 8px base unit (spacing.base.8) — all padding/margins are multiples of 8. Section top/bottom internal padding is 32px (padding.section.top_bottom_32); each section owns its own top AND bottom padding with no external margins between sections (assembly is zero-gap stacking). Standard gaps: heading→body 16px, paragraph→paragraph 16px (spacing.gap.heading_body_16), body→callout/CTA 24px (spacing.gap.body_callout_24), image→caption 8px.

quotes: Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill
Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.

Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette]:** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.

rules.intent: Preserve the approved, contrast-checked, accessible CTA button treatment.
rules.rule_text: Primary CTA buttons use Brand Blue #00529b background (cta.button.fill), White #ffffff text (cta.button.label.color), Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px (padding.button.14_32), minimum touch target 48px height (size.touch_target.min_height — brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), and corner radius 24px (radius.button.pill_24, fully rounded pill echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA uses White background, 2px Brand Blue border (border.secondary_cta.brand_blue_2px), Brand Blue text, and the same metrics.

quotes: One primary CTA per section maximum.
One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Prevent competing calls to action within a single section.
rules.rule_text: A maximum of one primary CTA is permitted per section.
